introSection: Cootie Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Galaxyland in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. It originally opened as Autosled and was later rethemed. It would now be themed to Hasbro's Cootie game.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has three helices, a tire-driven lift hill and interacts with the train ride, Galaxy Orbiter, and HAVOC.

fullText:
Cootie Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Galaxyland in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. It originally opened as Autosled and was later rethemed. It would now be themed to Hasbro's Cootie game.

The ride has three helices, a tire-driven lift hill and interacts with the train ride, Galaxy Orbiter, and HAVOC.

Yellow track and green supports.




 * Cootie Coaster on the parks website
